_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: Snap-in dorsal electronics and battery module, tool-less lid, wireless board bay, service label and cable exits
physics_paths: Load path: Hand-mounted weight transfer to back-of-hand frame via standoffs
Flow path: Air circulation around electronics for cooling via vent holes
Thermal path: Heat dissipation from controller board to ambient air via heat sink fins
Motion path: Lid opening and closing via hinge mechanism
Pressure path: Cable strain relief via flexible grommet
integration_opportunities: Optimize lid opening angle for user access
Enhance vent hole design for better airflow
Improve battery holder shape for secure fit
